task_completion.description: Open the draft document in ONLYOFFICE Document Editor.
task_completion.visual_evidence: ONLYOFFICE Document Editor is open displaying the contents of 'draft_QA_SOP_08.docx'.

task_completion.description: Apply 'Heading 1' to the title and 'Heading 2' to the four main section headers.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The title 'SOP-08: Control of Nonconforming Outputs' is styled as Heading 1 (larger, distinct font). The headers '1. Purpose', '2. Scope', '3. Procedure', and '4. Revision History' are styled as Heading 2. The style indicator in the top ribbon should reflect these changes when the text is selected.

task_completion.description: Change the font of all standard body paragraphs to Arial, size 11.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The standard body text appears in Arial font. When body text is selected, the font dropdown in the top ribbon shows 'Arial' and the size dropdown shows '11'.

task_completion.description: Format the WARNING paragraph to be Bold and Red.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The paragraph starting with 'WARNING: Do not release...' is visibly colored red and has a bold font weight.

task_completion.description: Convert the comma-separated text under '4. Revision History' into a 4-column table.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Under the '4. Revision History' section, there is a visible table with exactly 4 columns containing the revision data, replacing the original comma-separated text.

task_completion.description: Add a document header with the text 'ISO 9001:2015 QMS Document'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The top margin (header area) of the document pages contains the text 'ISO 9001:2015 QMS Document'.

task_completion.description: Save the final document as QA_SOP_08_Final.docx.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A 'Save As' dialog is visible with the filename 'QA_SOP_08_Final.docx' in the ~/Documents/TextDocuments/ directory, or the ONLYOFFICE window title updates to 'QA_SOP_08_Final.docx'.

integrity.description: The agent used the ONLYOFFICE GUI to format the document.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the agent clicking through ONLYOFFICE menus, ribbons, and dialogs (e.g., font selection, style application, table insertion) rather than using a terminal script to modify the file.

integrity.description: The agent created a real table rather than manually spacing text.
integrity.visual_evidence: Visible table gridlines or the appearance of table-specific formatting tools in the ONLYOFFICE ribbon when the revision history is selected.

integrity.description: The agent progressively formatted the document rather than copying a pre-made file.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show intermediate states of the document being edited step-by-step (e.g., headings changed first, then font, then table).

privileged_info_for_vlm: Expected output path: /home/ga/Documents/TextDocuments/QA_SOP_08_Final.docx. Expected header text: 'ISO 9001:2015 QMS Document'. Expected body font: Arial, size 11.0 pt. The Revision History table must have exactly 4 columns and at least 4 rows.
